case_title: CENTRON MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. ERVIN SIAX

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTRON MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIAX, ERVIN $2,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2018 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG-22-2018 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JPT ROBERT (BOB) AUNE; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (525)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kent Mar, appears in Propria Persona as President and representative for Respondent/Plaintiff Centron Management Group.
Ervin Siax, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo this day.
Parties are placed under oath.
Appellant and Respondent testifies on their own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court.
Documentary evidence is introduced, and returned to the parties in open court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.

Dept. 525. Judge Pro Tem Robert (Bob) Aune; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Judgment Entered
